description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms raised and extended above the head, forming a wide V-shape. The person has a slender build and is dressed in a sleeveless top and straight-cut pants, with visible shoes. The facial features are simplified, and the hair is styled in a medium-length, straight cut. The arms are disproportionately long compared to the rest of the body, creating a striking and unusual silhouette. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian, but the arm pose and proportions are highly atypical.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated, raised arms, wearing a sleeveless top and pants, and standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, and both arms raised in a wide V above the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's length, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the top, and the arms crossing above the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm extension, and the straight leg stance.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and extended above the head
